label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Zoom collects substantial data including video and audio recordings. Announced AI training use for service improvement. End-to-end encryption available but not default. Has faced privacy scrutiny; offers institutional compliance features for HIPAA, FERPA, and SOC 2.
